/usr/local/vitasdk/bin/arm-vita-eabi-g++  -Wl,-q -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-z,nocopyreloc CMakeFiles/exec.dir/main.cpp.obj -o Release/exec  SDL/libSDL3.a -lm -lpib -llibScePiglet_stub_weak -ltaihen_stub_weak -lSceShaccCg_stub_weak -lSceGxm_stub -lSceDisplay_stub -lSceCtrl_stub -lSceAppMgr_stub -lSceAppUtil_stub -lSceAudio_stub -lSceAudioIn_stub -lSceSysmodule_stub -lSceDisplay_stub -lSceCtrl_stub -lSceAppMgr_stub -lSceAppUtil_stub -lSceAudio_stub -lSceAudioIn_stub -lSceSysmodule_stub -lSceIofilemgr_stub -lSceCommonDialog_stub -lSceTouch_stub -lSceHid_stub -lSceMotion_stub -lScePower_stub -lSceProcessmgr_stub -lSceCamera_stub
